originalTitle: 1M FPS mini-DoTA/LoL for RL. Dev day #9
title: Refactoring Spawn Logic and Adding Skill Function Pointers in Mini-MOBA
summary: Worked on cleaning up the mini-MOBA environment code, replacing hardcoded spawns with data-driven loops and enabling skill usage via Cython function pointers. Also launched a carbs hyperparameter sweep for automated tuning.
